ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wine_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wine type */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Free sulfur dioxide of the wine (mg/dm^3) */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" INTEGER /* Total sulfur dioxide of the wine (mg/dm^3) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine (g/cm^3) */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates of the wine (g/dm^3) */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine (%) */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the wine (0-10) */,
  "k_fold" INTEGER /* K-fold cross-validation fold */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was produced */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the wine bottle */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the wine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the wine was produced */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the wine */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Vintage year of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_samples_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES wine_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine type */,
  "ideal_temperature" REAL /* Ideal serving temperature of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the wine type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winemaking_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winemaking technique */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the winemaking technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the winemaking technique */,
  "technique_date" TEXT /* Date when the technique was applied */,
  "technique_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the technique was applied */,
  "technique_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winemaking_techniques_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting note */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the tasting note */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the wine (0-10) */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster */,
  "tasting_date" TEXT /* Date when the tasting was conducted */,
  "tasting_location" TEXT /* Location where the tasting was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., wine expert, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "predicted_quality" REAL /* Predicted quality of the wine */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the wine sample */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_type_wine_samples" (
  "wine_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine type */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_type_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_sample_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sample */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., chemical, physical) */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the feature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_sample_features_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES wine_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "data_set" TEXT /* Data set used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
